- '[[openalex-2604.25139-conflict-forecasting-via-conformal-prediction-for-markov-pro]]'
title: Conformal Prediction under Non-Exchangeability
---

**Background:** Conformal prediction methods rely on the assumption of exchangeability, which is systematically violated in time-series data generated by Markov processes.

**Question / Future Work:** Investigate theoretical conditions and practical calibration strategies to achieve valid uncertainty coverage for Markovian processes where standard exchangeability assumptions fail.

**Why It Matters:** This is a fundamental bottleneck for deploying robust, distribution-free uncertainty quantification in real-world time-series forecasting.
